title: melothria gilgiana
intro: Melothria gilgiana, also known as the gac fruit or white gourd, is a type of edible vine plant native to Asia and the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Melothria gilgiana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Melothria gilgiana is often consumed as a juice, tea, or added to soups and stir-fries, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
